data.title: Europe's first meteorological infrared sounder shows 3D atmosphere data. IR Sounder aboard MTG-S1 satellite produces images at EU Space Conference.
data.description: Today at the EU Space Conference in Brussels, groundbreaking images from Europe's first meteorological infrared sounder were revealed. The Infrared Sounder (IRS) aboard the Meteosat Third Generation Sounder-1 (MTG-S1) captured these images, marking a significant step forward in monitoring atmospheric changes before and during severe weather events. The MTG-S1 is the first European satellite in geostationary orbit to carry a hyperspectral atmospheric sounder. This development allows for improved monitoring capabilities and paves the way for more accurate weather forecasting.

data.title: Schneider Electric partners with McLaren Racing as Official Energy Technology Partner.
data.description: McLaren Racing has recently signed a partnership with Schneider Electric, designating the company as the Official Energy Technology Partner. This collaboration is set to focus on enhancing energy efficiency and sustainability within McLaren's operations. This partnership aims to leverage Schneider Electric's expertise in energy management to drive innovative solutions within the racing industry. The deal is part of McLaren's broader sustainability strategy, aiming to reduce carbon emissions and improve energy performance. The agreement signifies a significant move for both parties, with McLaren Racing benefiting from Schneider Electric's advanced energy technologies, while the latter gains exposure in the high-profile world of Formula 1 racing. This alliance is poised to revolutionize energy technology within McLaren Racing, potentially setting new benchmarks for sustainability practices in the motorsport sector.

data.title: CRISPR Therapeutics AG facing pressure with insider sales and slow revenue growth, favored by Cathie Wood's funds. Momentum score drops.
data.description: CRISPR Therapeutics AG, a Swiss-American biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbol CRSP, has faced challenges in recent weeks. Insider sales, slow revenue growth, and low adoption of its primary products have contributed to renewed pressure on the company. Despite being a top holding in several funds managed by Cathie Wood's Ark Invest, such as the Ark Innovation ETF (BATS: ARKK) and the Ark Genomic Revolution ETF (BATS: ARKG), CRISPR Therapeutics AG has experienced a decline in its Momentum score. This biotech stock's performance has seen a decrease over the past few days. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Securitas AB's Full-Year Report for 2025 will be released on Feb 4, 2026, at 8.00 am (CET) in Stockholm.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Securitas AB announced that they are set to release their Full-Year Report for January-December 2025 on February 4, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (CET). The report will be distributed through a press release from Cision (www.cision.se).

data.title: Dow gains 300+ points before earnings; Fear & Greed Index 'Neutral'. Stocks rebound after last week's losses. Company shares drop.
data.description: The latest data from the CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicates an improvement in overall market sentiment, although it remains within the "Neutral" zone as of Monday. In the U.S. stock market, there was a positive trend as the Dow Jones index surged by over 300 points in the trading session. This surge comes ahead of a significant week filled with major earnings reports and the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision. Last week, stocks faced losses with the Dow dropping by 0.5% and the S&P 500 falling approximately 0.4%. Revolution Medicines Inc (NASDAQ: RVMD) experienced a notable decline of 17% on Monday after reports surfaced that Merck is no longer considering acquiring the company. Additionally, Steel Dynamics Inc (NASDAQ: STLD) reported disappointing earnings for the fourth quarter. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EQT Foundation offers breakthrough science grants worth EUR 25,000 to EUR 100,000 to reduce critical mineral dependence.
data.description: The EQT Foundation has announced the opening of applications for grants aimed at developing deep technology solutions to address the issue of critical mineral dependence in climate technologies. The grant program offered by the foundation will provide funding ranging from EUR 25,000 to EUR 100,000. The initiative aims to support innovative projects that tackle this pressing challenge. Recently launched in Stockholm on January 27, 2026, this new funding opportunity invites interested parties to submit their proposals for consideration.

data.title: Agentic automation in Europe is growing with increased sophistication; service development accelerating, says ISG.
data.description: The growth of intelligent automation in Europe is progressing, showcasing increased sophistication and rapid advancements in service and solution creation, according to ISG. The region is witnessing a noteworthy evolution in this field, with significant developments being made in artificial intelligence.
